content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K018
Account Executive: James Okafor
Call Type: Annual Business Review
Date: February 18, 2025
Participants: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO), Natalie Brooks (Head of Client Services)

James Okafor: Alex, Natalie — great to have you both. You've been one of our best expansion stories over the past two years. I wanted to do a deeper review as we head into 2025.

Alex Nguyen: Happy to. Natalie, why don't you start with the client feedback side.

Natalie Brooks: Our clients love the branded reports. We've standardized the InsightIQ dashboard as part of our monthly service delivery and it's become an expected deliverable. Two clients have specifically said it's one of the reasons they renewed with us.

James Okafor: That's a strong signal. Alex, where are you on SSO? I know that's been on your list.

Alex Nguyen: Still waiting. It's been on your roadmap for over a year now. Do you have a firm date?

James Okafor: I pushed on this before our call. Q2 2025 is the committed date. I'll send you the product update in writing after this call.

Alex Nguyen: I need it in writing before we commit to another year. It's a blocker for two of our enterprise clients.

James Okafor: Understood. You'll have it today. On the expansion side — you mentioned adding clients in 2025. Where are you now at 35 users?

Alex Nguyen: We expect to hit 45 users by year end based on our pipeline.

James Okafor: Let's build that into the renewal conversation. I'll put a proposal together that accounts for growth so you're not coming back mid-year for a contract amendment.

Alex Nguyen: Good thinking. Send the SSO confirmation and we'll get the renewal moving.
